curation.synopsis: Long ago the convent-outpost of Sanctuary 101 fell silent, overrun by the soulless, deathless necrons, and the truth of its destruction was buried by the Ecclesiarchy. Now Sister Miriya and Hospitaller Sister Verity lead a mission of the Order of Our Martyred Lady back to the dead world to reconsecrate the ground their predecessors died defending. But the metal horrors still stir in the dark, guarding a secret kept for millennia. What begins as a rite of remembrance becomes a desperate battle for survival, one that can end only in the annihilation of the ancient xenos or the destruction of the proud Sisterhood. Faith and bolter, hammer and anvil, Miriya's sisters will need both to endure.
